name: collection-list
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.collections.every(c => typeof c.id === 'string' && typeof c.artworkCount === 'number')
_note: gallery.collection-list returns the caller's collections, auto-seeding a default 'Favorites' on first read so count is always >= 1 for a real actor. Each row carries id/name/artworkCount/cover. Per-user isolated by ctx actor.
